name: Emery Smith
summary: Media personality who has publicly claimed involvement in classified medical and biological programs concerning alleged non-human material.

relationships.role: Former service member, as publicly described

profileSummary: Media personality who has publicly claimed involvement in classified medical and biological programs concerning alleged non-human material.
background: Self-described U.S. Air Force veteran, medical specialist, and former classified-program participant.
inclusionNote: Included because of his visibility within modern disclosure media and the influence of his claims on public discussion. Publicly verifiable documentation for the alleged programs is limited.
